misc: Regularly competes in the Finnish Mid Tour as well with decent results
biography: Sami, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a wealth of experience to the competition. Representing Hirsala Golf, Sami is known for his calculated approach and unwavering focus on the course. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, his consistent presence in the tournament demonstrates his commitment to the sport and the unique challenges presented by this event.

Off the greens, Sami is known for his quiet demeanor and sharp wit, often engaging in thoughtful conversations about course strategy and the finer points of the game. His fellow competitors respect his sportsmanship and appreciate his dedication to fair play.

Sami regularly competes in the Finnish Mid Tour as well, achieving decent results that further highlight his abilities. As he prepares for his eighth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026, Sami hopes to leverage his experience and skills to finally capture the elusive title.
